mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Choose what kind of Threads page to crawl.

accounts.title: Account list
accounts.description: Threads usernames to crawl. You can enter usernames with or without @.

bulkAccounts.title: Bulk paste accounts
bulkAccounts.description: Paste up to 100 accounts, separated by new lines, commas, or spaces.

keywordsOrTags.title: Keywords / tags
keywordsOrTags.description: Keywords or tags for tag/topic and search modes. Enter tags with or without #.

bulkKeywordsOrTags.title: Bulk paste keywords
bulkKeywordsOrTags.description: Paste keywords or tags separated by new lines or commas.

searchSort.title: Search tab
searchSort.description: Threads keyword search tab to crawl: most relevant, recent, or profiles.

startDate.title: Start date
startDate.description: Optional absolute start date. Applies best-effort filtering to visible relative timestamps.

endDate.title: End date
endDate.description: Optional absolute end date. Applies best-effort filtering to visible relative timestamps.

relativeDate.title: Relative date
relativeDate.description: Optional relative date window, for example: 7 days, 1 month, 24 hours.

postLanguageFilter.title: Post language filter
postLanguageFilter.description: Post-processing filter for extracted posts. This is not a Threads URL parameter. Traditional Chinese is the default.

threadUrls.title: Thread URLs
threadUrls.description: Single post / thread URLs. Replies are extracted when publicly visible.

feedUrls.title: Custom feed URLs
feedUrls.description: Custom Threads feed URLs to crawl.

maxPostsPerAccount.title: Max posts per account
maxPostsPerAccount.description: Maximum number of posts to return per crawled account or target.

includeRawText.title: Include raw visible text
includeRawText.description: Store the full visible page text for debugging parser changes.

cookies.title: Session cookies
cookies.description: Optional session cookies JSON array. Copy cookies from your browser while logged into Threads (using extensions like EditThisCookie) to crawl personalized feeds or avoid login walls.

telegramToken.title: Telegram bot token
telegramToken.description: Optional Telegram Bot Token. If set, results will be sent to the Telegram chat.

telegramChatId.title: Telegram chat ID
telegramChatId.description: Optional Telegram Chat ID (can be user ID or channel/group ID).
